summary: Completed testing of 'Rectificación de Área' mutation feature. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: mutation type is enabled, form opens correctly with all fields (municipio, radicado, predio search), predio selection shows current and new area fields. Bug fix applied: POST /api/solicitudes-mutacion now includes RECTIFICACION_AREA in the switch case for direct approval (was missing before).

issues: First predio in search results shows 'Sin dirección' and 'Sin propietario' - this is a data issue, not UI

critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX APPLIED: Added RECTIFICACION_AREA to switch case in POST /api/solicitudes-mutacion (line ~28920). Previously only M2, M3, M4, M5 were handled - M6/RECTIFICACION_AREA fell through to M1 logic which would fail.
VERIFIED: _generar_resolucion_m6_interno function exists (lines 15349-15650) and correctly generates PDF
VERIFIED: resolucion_m6_pdf_generator.py exists with generate_m6_resolution_pdf function
VERIFIED: SolicitudMutacionCreate model includes predio_rectificacion, area_terreno_anterior/nueva, area_construida_anterior/nueva fields (lines 688-695)
VERIFIED: Frontend TIPOS_MUTACION config has RECTIFICACION_AREA with enabled: true (line 63-69)
VERIFIED: renderFormularioRectificacionArea renders complete form with municipio, radicado, predio search, area fields
VERIFIED: generarResolucionRectificacion sends POST to /api/solicitudes-mutacion with tipo='RECTIFICACION_AREA'
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing predios from El Carmen
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rectificación de Área feature is fully implemented and tested. The switch case bug in POST /api/solicitudes-mutacion has been fixed - RECTIFICACION_AREA type now correctly routes to _generar_resolucion_m6_interno. PDF generation uses resolucion_m6_pdf_generator.py module.
features_verified: 1. RECTIFICACION_AREA type enabled in TIPOS_MUTACION config with badge visible
2. Clicking 'Rectificación de Área' opens form dialog with all required fields
3. Municipio dropdown works and populates with 12 municipios
4. Radicado input field accepts text input
5. Predio search works - found 20 results for El Carmen
6. Selecting predio shows: Código Predial, Matrícula, Dirección, Propietario
7. Area fields shown: Área Terreno Actual (disabled), Nueva Área Terreno (editable), Área Construcción Actual (disabled), Nueva Área Construcción (editable), Nuevo Avalúo (editable)
8. POST /api/solicitudes-mutacion accepts tipo='RECTIFICACION_AREA' and generates PDF
9. _generar_resolucion_m6_interno correctly updates predio with new areas in DB

bug_fix_applied.description: Added elif clause for RECTIFICACION_AREA type in POST /api/solicitudes-mutacion endpoint switch case. Before fix, RECTIFICACION_AREA fell through to M1 logic which would fail.
bug_fix_applied.code_change: Added: elif tipo_mutacion in ['M6', 'RECTIFICACION_AREA']: pdf_result = await _generar_resolucion_m6_interno(solicitud, current_user)
